domain: developmental biology (morphogen gradient) + reaction-diffusion physics (Turing patterns) jointly
specific_mechanism: JOINT morphogen-gradient + reaction-diffusion-bistability for LLM multi-agent role differentiation
llm_application: LLM agent populations differentiate roles by reading a shared activation-vector field gradient AND each agent locally instantiates a Turing-stable bistable response, jointly producing sharp role boundaries without central assignment
novelty_claim: Conjunction of morphogen field AND reaction-diffusion bistability is what's claimed novel; either alone is published. The joint specification gives sharp role boundaries.
